title: PSM Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) Record
description: Evidence model for Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) records per OSHA-KR Article 38 + 안전보건기준규칙 Article 92 + KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for the LOTO record.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the record was created

agent_id.description: ID of the agent that generated this record

date.description: Date the LOTO permit was issued.

permit_number.description: Unique permit number assigned to this LOTO authorization.

equipment_id.description: Identifier of the equipment being isolated.

energy_types_isolated.description: Hazardous energy source types isolated for this LOTO.

isolation_points.description: Isolation points (locks/tags) applied for this LOTO, supporting multiple simultaneous locks (Group LOTO). Per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §6.2, the tag must remain attached to the lock and identify the person, work window, and contact information.

point_id.description: Identifier of the isolation point (e.g., breaker, valve, disconnect).

location.description: Physical location of the isolation point.

lock_applied_by.description: Name or ID of the person who applied the lock at this isolation point.

lock_id.description: Unique identifier of the lock applied at this isolation point.

contact_info.description: Contact information for the person who applied the lock, as required on the tag (꼬리표) per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §3.5 and §6.2.

timestamp.description: Date and time the lock was applied.

lock_type.description: Lock classification per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §3.2-3.4: personal_lock (개인잠금 — solo worker, solo lock), individual_locking (개별잠금 — one isolation point, 2+ workers), group_isolation_locking (그룹잠금 — 2+ isolation points or 2+ work teams, e.g. multi-contractor TAR scenarios).

supervisor_confirmation_by.description: Name or ID of the 관리감독자 (supervisor) confirming lock/tag safety measures are in place, per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §5.2 responsibility structure.

verified_zero_energy_by.description: Name or ID of the person who confirmed zero-energy state before work began.

expected_reenergize_notified.description: Confirms all related personnel were notified of the expected re-energize time before lock/tag removal and equipment restart, per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §6.1.3(3)(사).

removal_confirmed_by.description: Name or ID of the person who confirmed all locks were removed and equipment restored. Per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §6.1.4/§8.5, only the person who applied a given lock may remove it under normal conditions.

emergency_removal.description: Present only if a lock was removed without its owner present, per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §6.3 (emergency lock removal procedure). Null under normal lock-removal conditions.

reason.description: Documented reason the emergency removal was necessary.

authorized_by.description: Supervisor/department head who authorized the emergency removal after confirming worker evacuation/safety.

signage_posted.description: Confirms warning signage/a monitor was placed at the isolation point so the returning lock owner is not exposed to an unexpected re-energized state, per §6.3.3.

last_periodic_review_date.description: Date this equipment's lock/tag procedure was last reviewed, per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §9.1 (minimum annual review of all lock/tag procedures). Null if this equipment has not yet had its first periodic review — tracked here as a compliance marker; scheduling/reminder automation is not implemented in this workflow yet.

tbm_ref.description: Reference to the joint Tool Box Meeting (합동 Tool Box Meeting) record where all involved parties (including contractors) determined the lock scope, per KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §6.1.2(1) and §8.2/§8.4. May reference an ehsconst-agent tbm-tool-box-meeting record when contractors are involved (e.g., during TAR).

asset_integrity_trigger_ref.description: Reference to the asset-integrity-agent inspection record that flagged this equipment as unsafe, if this LOTO was triggered by an asset-integrity finding rather than routine maintenance.

risk_assessment_ref.description: Reference to the risk-assessment-agent record identifying which energy sources are hazardous for this equipment.

tar_id.description: Turnaround (TAR) event ID this LOTO permit was issued under, if applicable — links back to the same turnaround_id/tar_id value used in ehschem-turnaround-record.json, contractor-tar-surge-record.json, and oh-tar-health-record.json. Null for routine, non-TAR maintenance LOTO records.

legal_basis.description: Multi-source legal basis. Confirmed: OSHA-KR Article 38 (안전조치), 산업안전보건기준에관한규칙 (Occupational Safety and Health Standards Rule) 제92조 (정비 등의 작업 시의 운전정지 등) — this specific sub-statute article was confirmed directly from KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022's own revision history (개정 이력, 2022.12.29), which cites it as the LOTO implementation basis. Also relevant: SAPA Article 4 (안전보건관리체계 구축 의무) and SAPA Article 5 (제3자/도급 근로자 안전조치 의무 — cited in KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §7.4 for contractor/third-party LOTO training obligations, relevant to Group Isolation Locking scenarios).
examples: 중대재해처벌법 Article 5 (도급 근로자 안전조치 의무 — KOSHA GUIDE Z-40-2022 §7.4)

closure_signature.description: Signature or name of the person who closed the permit upon work completion.
